item.title: Version 1.2.10
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.10

  • Fix: old chats now open at the bottom — opening a previous chat now correctly lands you at the most recent message.

item.title: Version 1.2.9
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.9

  • Fix: scroll freeze properly solved — all text rendering (markdown parsing, syntax highlighting) now runs on a background thread. The main thread does nothing while rows load during scroll.

item.title: Version 1.2.8
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.8

  • Fix: scroll freeze completely gone — text rendering and syntax highlighting now happen off the main thread as rows load while scrolling. The app stays smooth no matter how long the chat is.

item.title: Version 1.2.7
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.7

  • Fix: long chats no longer freeze — opening an old chat with hundreds of messages is now instant. Only the last 150 messages load on open; a "Show earlier messages" button reveals the rest on demand.
  • Faster scrolling — the chat feed does far less work while you scroll through a long conversation.
  • Typing no longer slows down big chats — keystrokes in the input box no longer re-render the entire message feed.

item.title: Version 1.2.6
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.6

  • Strawberry menu bar icon — the menu bar icon is now the Berries Code strawberry silhouette, and correctly switches between black and white based on your menu bar style.

item.title: Version 1.2.5
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.5

  • Fix: Plugins row alignment — the Plugins sidebar row now lines up exactly with Settings.

item.title: Version 1.2.4
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.4

  • Plugin Store — browse, search, and install Claude Code plugins without touching the terminal. Find it in the sidebar under your projects (puzzle-piece icon). Filter by category, search by name or keyword, and install with one click. Installed plugins show a checkmark and can be uninstalled from the card or the detail view.

item.title: Version 1.2.3
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.3

  • Select text mode — a new "Select text" button at the top-right of the chat turns the conversation into one continuous document, so you can drag-select any part (or all) of a chat and copy it. Copied text comes out labeled You:/Claude: so it stays readable wherever you paste it.
  • Clean chats — internal machinery (skill instructions, plugin/hook notes) no longer shows up inside your conversations.

item.title: Version 1.2.2
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.2

  • Fix: chats disappeared from the sidebar after 1.2.1 — the background-session filter was too broad and also hid chats created by this app. No data was lost; all chats reappear after this update.

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.1

  • No more phantom chats — background security-review sessions created by Claude Code plugins no longer appear in the sidebar.
  • Freeze fix — the sidebar no longer re-reads entire session files on every refresh; large sessions can't lock up the app anymore.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.0

  • Drag & drop images — drop an image anywhere in the app and it attaches as a chip, exactly like the + button. Works with Finder files, screenshot thumbnails, and images dragged from browsers.
  • Dropping an image on the message box no longer pastes the file path as text.
  • A "Drop image to attach" highlight shows while you're dragging.
